name: HR Full Implementation
description: Complete HR implementation workflow: analyze org structure, configure employees and contracts, set up attendance, leaves, expenses, recruitment, and validation.

steps.name: Analyze Requirements
steps.description: Analyze HR requirements: departments, contracts, leave policies, expense flows, recruitment process

steps.name: Configure Org Structure
steps.description: Create department hierarchy, managers, and employee records

steps.name: Setup Contracts & Schedules
steps.description: Create contract types, working schedules, and employee contracts

steps.name: Configure Leave Types & Allocations
steps.description: Set up leave types, accrual plans, and initial allocations

steps.name: Configure Expenses
steps.description: Create expense categories, journals, and approval workflows

steps.name: Configure Recruitment
steps.description: Create job positions, recruitment stages, and refusal reasons

steps.name: Final Validation
steps.description: Test leave request, expense submission, attendance entry, and applicant workflow
